articles.title: Jarren Duran had another confrontation with a fan at Fenway Park
articles.description:
“I don’t want to get into the details, just enough for us to say, ‘Can you please get him out?'”

The post Jarren Duran had another confrontation with a fan at Fenway Park appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jarren Duran confronted a fan at Fenway Park during a recent game.
Duran requested security to remove the fan involved in the incident.
This incident raises concerns about player-fan interactions at Boston sporting events.

articles.title: France records around 1,000 additional deaths as extreme heat breaks European records
articles.description:
A study from the World Weather Attribution suggests climate change made this heat wave 200 times more likely than 20 years ago.

The post France records around 1,000 additional deaths as extreme heat breaks European records appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: France reports approximately 1,000 additional deaths due to extreme heat this summer.
World Weather Attribution study links climate change to heat wave, increasing likelihood by 200 times.
Boston residents may face similar climate impacts, emphasizing the need for local climate action.

articles.title: Brookline party store, Chinese restaurant both close after decades in business
articles.description:
Golden Temple was open to Brookline residents for 66 years, while Party Favors was in business for 35 years.

The post Brookline party store, Chinese restaurant both close after decades in business appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Golden Temple Chinese restaurant closes after 66 years of service in Brookline.
Party Favors party store shuts down after 35 years in the community.
Both closures leave residents without long-standing local dining and shopping options.

articles.title: Celtics reportedly sign Ron Harper Jr. to 3-year deal
articles.description:
Ron Harper Jr. earned a larger role on Boston's bench as the 2025-26 season went on.

The post Celtics reportedly sign Ron Harper Jr. to 3-year deal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics sign Ron Harper Jr. to a 3-year deal, enhancing team depth.
Harper Jr. increased his role during the 2025-26 season, contributing to team performance.
Boston fans can expect more competitive play with Harper Jr. on the roster.

articles.title: 2 JP residents bitten by raccoons in separate incidents, animal control says
articles.description:
Animal control officers were not able to locate the raccoons, officials said Saturday.

The post 2 JP residents bitten by raccoons in separate incidents, animal control says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two Jamaica Plain residents were bitten by raccoons in separate incidents.
Animal control was unable to locate the raccoons involved in the bites.
Residents are urged to be cautious and report any raccoon sightings.
